message.content:
1/ Imagine waking up to find your life savings gone. Not stolen from your bank account, but drained from your DeFi wallet through a vulnerability you never knew exists. This isn't hypothetical—it's happening now.

2/ The worst part? There's nowhere to turn. Traditional courts don't understand smart contracts. Regulators are still writing rules. You're left alone against faceless attackers.

3/ I watched a friend lose everything when an AI trading bot he trusted was compromised. The bot executed millions of transactions in minutes, draining his portfolio before anyone could react.

4/ When Bybit lost $500M to an exploit, they absorbed the loss. Regular people can't. These incidents aren't statistics—they're lives disrupted, dreams deferred.

5/ The legal system feels outdated when dealing with digital assets. Trying to explain blockchain vulnerabilities to a judge who barely understands email is impossible.

6/ InternetCourt.org exists because we shouldn't have to choose between participating in the digital economy and protecting our assets. How will you secure your digital future?

7/ As AI agents increasingly control our assets, we need specialized justice systems. InternetCourt.org provides that—justice in the digital age. Have you experienced asset loss without recourse?
